jsonLd.title: Medanta is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Medanta has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!
